output.sparql:
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?protected_area ?area_value ?name WHERE {
  ?protected_area wdt:P31 wd:Q832156 ; wdt:P2046 ?area ; rdfs:label ?name .
  ?area wikibase:quantityAmount ?area_value .
  FILTER(?area_value > 250000)
  FILTER(LANG(?name) = "en")
}
output.answer: There are no protected areas in Wikidata with an area larger than 250,000 square kilometers based on the current dataset.
